command: bash -c './scripts/docs-lint.sh && ! grep -n "CHEATSHEET.md" README.md AGENTS.md TESTING.md docs/README.md docs/contributor-guide.md docs/observability.md scripts/README.md && ! grep -n "stress-acp.sh" TESTING.md docs/observability.md scripts/README.md && ! grep -n "stress-orchestration.sh" TESTING.md scripts/README.md && ! grep -n "stress-program.sh" TESTING.md scripts/README.md && ! grep -n "stress-brain-recovery.sh" TESTING.md scripts/README.md && ! grep -n "stress-checkpoint-fault.sh" TESTING.md docs/observability.md scripts/README.md'
bash -c 'go test ./internal/integration -run TestCITierContract -count=1 && go test ./internal/integration -run TestProductionSmokeLane -count=1 && shellcheck -S error scripts/ci-local.sh'
